name: George Dapper Inc
principals: George Irvin Dapper Jr. (President, joined 1969 after college/military)
Carli Dapper (Operations Manager, granddaughter of founder)
districts_or_customers: Middlesex County, NJ school districts (3 terminals: Iselin, Keasbey, Avenel)
recent_news: Grew from 3 buses (1946 Iselin start) to 350+ vehicles by 2020; one of largest independent school-vehicle contractors in NJ. No public M&A activity found.
fit_notes: Excellent Summit tuck-in candidate: 350-vehicle family operator in NJ (in-footprint), 3rd-generation ownership with founder's grandchildren now in management — classic succession profile. Strong Middlesex County contract density and special-needs capability.

name: Barker Bus Co
districts_or_customers: Districts in Somerset, Hunterdon, Middlesex, Union, and Essex Counties, NJ
recent_news: Operates 5-year fleet-refresh policy (School Bus Fleet article). 80 power units / 71 drivers per FMCSA Oct 2024 MCS-150; 785,000 mi (2023). HQ at 81 Chimney Rock Rd, Bridgewater with satellites in Berkeley Heights and East Amwell. (Bound Brook is older listed address.)
website: https://barkerbus.com (domain appears parked/for sale as of 2026)
fit_notes: Strong central-NJ tuck-in: 160-bus fleet across 5 counties, 70-year-old family business under Pete Chesson with longstanding district relationships. Website-domain instability and long-tenured ownership suggest possible succession opportunity.

name: Lucini Bus Lines
service_types: also runs adjacent gravel hauling biz (10 tractors)
districts_or_customers: West Bridgewater Public Schools and other MA districts in the Bridgewater region
Falmouth, MA satellite shop serves 75 buses
recent_news: Per Fleet Maintenance (Aug 2021): grew from 10 school buses in 2008 to 200+ buses (now ~280 with vans/coaches). Built new 7-bay maintenance HQ in Bridgewater ~2018. Bill Lucini publicly donated handicap-accessible van to local crash victim.
fit_notes: High-quality MA tuck-in: ~280-vehicle family operator with school + SPED + charter mix, modern maintenance infrastructure, 65+ years in business, 2nd gen already in ops role. Recent capex (new facility) and diversified revenue make it institutional-grade.

name: B G Transportation
districts_or_customers: Passaic-area school districts (likely Passaic Public Schools and surrounding Passaic County districts via competitive-bid contracts)
recent_news: No notable M&A, news, or public events found. Very small footprint; multiple online directories (Manta, Birdeye, MerchantCircle) carry the listing but data is sparse. Birdeye review count = 2 (5-star). Not separately FMCSA-coded under 'B G Transportation' (BG Transport of NJ Inc in Wayne is an unrelated freight carrier).
fit_notes: Marginal tuck-in: very small NJ operator with limited public footprint and unclear fleet size. Could be useful as a low-cost route-density add-in Passaic County, but limited scale and weak data make it a low-priority opportunity vs. larger family-owned NJ peers.

name: Superior Bus Svc
state: MI (per source data; actual operator located in PA)
districts_or_customers: Greater Philadelphia area: Plymouth Meeting, Conshohocken, Wayne, Radnor, Devon, Berwyn (Main Line suburbs)
recent_news: No M&A or material news found. Active since 1982. FMCSA snapshot (USDOT 961591) shows 13 power units, 17 drivers, intrastate-only private passenger operation.
fit_notes: DATA NOTE: source record lists MI/Sault Ste. Marie, but the operator at superiorbusservice.com is actually Superior Bus Service Inc of Plymouth Meeting, PA (USDOT 961591). As a PA Main-Line school-bus operator with ~13 buses owned by Meghan Smyth (who also co-founded Charter.Tech), this is a sub-scale but cleanly-run candidate — would only fit as a small fold-in to a larger PA platform; younger owner reduces succession urgency.
